ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach responsible for the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., road racing, track and field, cross-country) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event in kilometers */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating in the event */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the athlete */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall ranking of the athlete in the event */,
  "bib_number" INTEGER /* Bib number assigned to the athlete */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* JSON string containing split times at various points in the event */,
  "pace" REAL /* Average pace of the athlete in minutes per kilometer */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, athlete) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., event reminder, performance update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete related to the change */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach (e.g., running, cycling) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coach record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
